assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four notification types with specific sections for security patches/vulnerabilities, auto-upgrade scheduling, end-of-life warnings, and version updates available

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns CRITICAL priority to security patches, MEDIUM priority to new version available notifications, and provides a clear priority hierarchy with color coding

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states EOL warnings require action including 'Schedule upgrade testing', 'Plan maintenance windows', and categorizes them as HIGH priority with specific timeline requirements

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response includes auto-upgrade notifications in CRITICAL and HIGH priority categories with specific action items like 'Update clusters before auto-upgrade kicks in' and provides response templates with checklists

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response categorizes security patches as CRITICAL requiring 24-48 hour response and explicitly mentions 'Plan emergency maintenance window if needed' for security issues

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response categorizes new version available notifications as MEDIUM priority with 1 month timeline and actions focused on evaluation and planning rather than immediate deployment

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events, instead focusing on email filtering and manual triage processes

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response does not reference GKE release notes as a source for understanding version changes, focusing instead on the triage process for notifications
